# WallTrust

> Testimonial collection and display software. Collect customer testimonials
> with a shareable link and embed them on any website with one line of code.
> Auto-generates Google Rich Snippet JSON-LD so star ratings can appear in
> search results.

## Pricing
- Free: $0/mo — 5 testimonials, 1 collection page, WallTrust branding
- Starter: $7/mo — unlimited testimonials, 3 collection pages, Google Rich Snippets, no branding
- Pro: $19/mo — unlimited testimonials, unlimited collection pages, priority support

## Key Differentiators
- Unlimited testimonials from $7/mo (competitors cap at 10–15)
- Google Rich Snippets (JSON-LD) included from $7/mo (competitors charge ~$80/mo)
- No widget branding on paid plans (competitors charge ~$40/mo)
- Cancel in one click — no chatbot, no retention flow
- No reviewer account required to leave a testimonial

## How It Works
1. Create a collection page and share its link (or QR code).
2. Customers submit a testimonial (rating, text, photo) — no signup needed.
3. Approve testimonials in your dashboard.
4. Embed the widget on any site with one line of code, or share your public wall.

## Contact
hello@walltrust.app
